name: Roman Forns
headline: Data Architect & BI Consultant
summary: Data Architect & Engineer with 10+ years designing and implementing large-scale data solutions across retail, chemicals, energy, and transport. Leads end-to-end data architecture, BI ecosystems, cloud data pipelines (GCP, Azure, Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric), and enterprise integration (SAP–Salesforce, event-driven). Delivers scalable platforms and reusable frameworks; acts as technical lead and solution architect on multi-year engagements. Expanding into Blockchain and AI for next-generation data ecosystems.
summaryExtended: Data Architect & Engineer with 10+ years in large-scale data solutions (retail, chemicals, energy, maritime). BI, Data Warehousing, cloud pipelines (GCP, Azure, Snowflake, Fabric), enterprise integration (SAP–Salesforce, event-driven), ETL (Talend, dbt, Airflow). Leads multidisciplinary teams; builds reusable frameworks and scalable BI/data platforms. Technical lead and solution architect on multi-year engagements. Expanding into Blockchain and AI.
coreStrengths: End-to-end data architecture and cloud data pipelines
BI ecosystems: Power BI, SSAS Tabular, semantic models, KPIs
Enterprise integration: SAP, Salesforce, event-driven architectures
ETL & orchestration: dbt, Apache Airflow, Talend, DataBricks
Technical leadership and solution architecture on multi-year engagements

experience.title: Data Architect & BI Consultant
experience.summary: Lead end-to-end data architecture, integration, and orchestration across retail, chemicals, energy, and transport. Deliver scalable BI, cloud data pipelines, and event-driven integrations for enterprise clients.
impact: Established best practices for event-driven architectures and data orchestration across heterogeneous systems.
Delivered cloud-native pipelines (GCP, Azure, Snowflake, Fabric), enabling scalable analytics and near real-time reporting.
Technical lead on integration and BI proposals; contributed architectural blueprints and reusable frameworks.
projects: INDITEX (Zara) — BI & Data for Sustainability and Commercial (~3 years): corporate sustainability dashboards, SSAS Tabular model (Join Life, rankings, composition), Snowflake data layer, Power BI reporting (SSP, GTW traceability), DataBricks pipelines, RLS and data governance.

TOUS (2025) — Migration of data platform (GPC_Tous): FastAPI APIs (recommendations, cart, wishlist), Repository Pattern and multi-level cache, Airflow DAGs metadata-driven (YAML), BigQuery/Datastore/Dataflow, Vista 360, 27+ pipelines migrated.

DOMO (2025–2026) — Customer data integration (Salesforce & Data Hub): canonical JSON model, custom Java JSON utility library (2.5k+ lines), Talend processes for read/write, backfill and CDC in three modules (Data Hub, CRM, ERP).

RENFE (2024–2025) — Analysis and optimisation of Power BI semantic model (FyM Inmovilizado, Snowflake): 10 modelling/DAX anti-patterns identified, impact with high volumetry documented, prioritised optimisation plan and phased roadmap.

DACSA (2025–2026) — Data platform migration on Microsoft Fabric & Dynamics 365: medallion architecture, dbt project (60+ Silver models, Gold dimensions), ingestion notebooks (Eurostat, AEMET, CBOT), CI/CD for dbt and SQL Warehouses.

experience.title: BI Data Analyst
experience.summary: Led the end-to-end design and implementation of the data & BI ecosystem for Bodegas Binifadet, from wine production to hospitality and gastronomy operations. Built scalable reporting frameworks for data-driven decisions across production, sales, and customer experience.
impact: Designed and deployed a centralized Data Warehouse integrating operational, financial, and production sources.
Developed BI dashboards and predictive models to optimize oenological processes, resource planning, and sales forecasting.
Standardized KPI frameworks and automated reporting pipelines; introduced data validation for quality and consistency.

experience.title: Deputy Project Director
experience.summary: Supported the Project Director in managing the mechanical and electrical scope of the IDG-E Package 3 Onshore Pipeline & Habshan Modifications Project for GASCO, as subcontractor to Técnicas Reunidas. Oversaw planning, reporting, and stakeholder coordination in a complex EPC environment.
impact: Directed cross-functional technical and administrative teams; prepared and updated project plans, schedules, and status reports.
Led stakeholder meetings to ensure delivery against scope, time, and budget; coordinated reconciliation and project close-out with accurate data collection.
Designed and implemented integrated dashboards to monitor project progress from engineering through commissioning, and executive dashboards for corporate committees and decision-makers.

experience.title: Deputy Asset Integrity Manager
experience.summary: Accountable for maintenance management and class certification of the GMS Jack Up Barges fleet (13 units: E-Class, S-Class, K-Class). Reviewed and improved preventive maintenance procedures; developed a fleet-wide integrated maintenance schedule aligned with class and OEM requirements.
impact: Identified and validated data sources; used Power BI to create KPIs and scorecards for maintenance plans and class certification targets.

Built a live fleet status dashboard integrating class inspections and maintenance, enabling management to forecast impact on fleet revenue; documented data definitions and budget priorities with stakeholders.

experience.title: Project Engineer
experience.summary: Managed the structural, piping and mechanical scope of a Jack Up Barges newbuild program (two NG-1800X, one NG-2500X); accountable for commissioning and sea trials. Set up a new fabrication and outfitting shipyard at Mina Zayed Port. Achieved 11% cost reduction on structural steel and 20% on piping; delivered commissioning and sea trials 2 weeks ahead of schedule.
impact: Developed integrated dashboards for engineering drawings status, materials procurement and delivery, manpower scenarios, fabrication/installation progress and QC clearance, and financial reporting (budget consumption, milestones).

experience.title: Project Engineer
experience.summary: Responsible for hull repairs, fabrication and installation of production plant steel modules and piping on the Sagar Samrat Jack Up Rig conversion (MODU to MOPU) for ONGC India. Delivered 7–12% savings in fabrication, installation and reconciliation; managed up to 380 multidisciplinary professionals.
impact: Implemented supply chain dashboards for raw materials; built productivity tracking and daily dashboards for documentation status, material availability, fabrication/installation progress, and budget consumption.

experience.title: Site Engineer
experience.summary: Accountable for steel construction and accommodation outfitting of the superstructure of the Rumailah Jack Up Rig newbuild for Gulf Drilling International Qatar. Achieved 8% saving on man-hours and 6% on equipment usage; completed on schedule; managed up to 170 workers and 5 subcontractors.
impact: Developed dashboards for workfront availability (drawings revision, material availability, QC reports), optimizing man-hours and equipment usage.

experience.title: Permit to Work Coordinator
experience.summary: Responsible for implementing and ensuring compliance of the Permit to Work system (~200 permits/day) for the Al Yasat Jack Up Rig conversion (MOPU to MODU) for National Drilling Company Abu Dhabi. Achieved zero Lost Time Incidents; issued daily priority permit lists by risk and project priorities; optimized PTW meetings.
impact: Developed dashboards to visualize simultaneous dry-dock activities with risk rating and task priority, enabling quick identification of permits for discussion and assessment.

skills.items: Power BI, SSAS Tabular, DAX, Power Query
Snowflake, GCP (BigQuery, Composer), Azure, Microsoft Fabric
REST APIs, FastAPI, Salesforce, SAP, event-driven architectures

education.degree: Master's Degree in Naval Architecture & Oceanic Engineering

personalProjects.title: SDG_TEST_DataTech — Metadata-driven data platform
personalProjects.description: End-to-end data transformation platform: reusable Spark framework (validation, versioning, writers), validated ingestion, RAW load to Snowflake/PostgreSQL, and Data Vault 2.0 + marts materialisation. Stack: Apache Airflow, Spark (PySpark), dbt; dataflows and configs in JSON.

personalProjects.title: MDIF — Metadata-Driven Ingestion Framework
personalProjects.description: Framework for automated data migration and ingestion across PostgreSQL, MySQL and Snowflake. Declarative YAML config (sources, destination, table schemas); automatic schema discovery (INFORMATION_SCHEMA); idempotent DDL generation with type mapping; batch and incremental (cursor-based) strategies; orchestration with Apache Airflow. Docker-based deployment.

personalProjects.title: On-Chain DeFi Risk Engine
personalProjects.description: Risk and credit-score engine for DeFi wallets (Aave V3 on Base). On-chain indexer (WebSocket + backfill), canonical event model in USD, idempotent persistence in PostgreSQL. Risk features (repayment ratio, liquidations, wallet age, protocol diversity, leverage) and configurable weighted scoring (0–100). REST API (Express/TypeScript) with rate limiting and validation; Next.js frontend for wallet lookup and score/features visualisation. Docker deployment.

personalProjects.title: Propuesta INDITEX IOP/CDP — Omnichannel Customer Platform
personalProjects.description: Response to Inditex RFI for an Omnichannel Customer Platform (IOP/CDP): proposal document (experience, architecture, identity resolution, roadmap) and executable MVP. Three core capabilities: real-time identity resolution (deterministic and probabilistic, risk flags, ACTIVE/SHADOW, merge ledger); unified Customer 360 profile and segmentation from 8+ sources; governance, consent (PDP, frequency capping) and RTBF with evidence. Raw–Silver–Gold architecture; FastAPI APIs; batch and near-real-time pipelines; contract-based validation.

personalProjects.title: Avv. Sorcecchi — Legal assistant with AI
personalProjects.description: RAG-based legal assistant for Italian law firms: document ingestion (PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD; optional OCR), semantic indexation (LlamaIndex, Chroma), conversational chat with cited sources. LangChain agents for summaries, legal drafts (atti giudiziari, comunicazioni, diffide) and case analysis (structured extraction). Case/expedient management, procedural timeline, scadenze and notifications, audit log, dashboard. Backend FastAPI, frontend Next.js; 100% local stack (Ollama, sentence-transformers, Chroma) for GDPR and professional secrecy.
